name: OpenAI Codex CLI
description: Installs OpenAI's Codex CLI (@openai/codex) via npm, with optional Node.js auto-install and a starter config.toml.

version.description: Version of @openai/codex to install (npm dist-tag or semver, e.g. 'latest', '0.20.0').

installNode.description: Install Node.js (via NodeSource) if 'node' is not already on PATH. Disable if you supply Node yourself.

nodeVersion.description: Major Node.js version to install when installNode is true (e.g. '18', '20', '22').

installConfig.description: Write a starter ~/.codex/config.toml for the remote user if one does not exist.
